title: Acid-Base Disorders: ABG, VBG, Anion Gap, Compensation, and Delta-Delta Guide
summary: Resident-level guide to acid-base disorders including ABG/VBG interpretation, primary disorder identification, anion gap calculation, albumin correction, NAGMA vs HAGMA, osmolar gap, Winter's formula, delta-delta gap, and respiratory compensation.

title: Acute Coronary Syndrome (ACS): STEMI, NSTEMI, Unstable Angina Guide
summary: Resident-level guide to Acute Coronary Syndrome including STEMI, NSTEMI, unstable angina, ECG interpretation, troponins, risk stratification, PCI vs CABG, and guideline-based management.

title: Atrial Fibrillation: The Complete Resident Guide
summary: Comprehensive resident-level review of atrial fibrillation including ECG diagnosis, stroke prevention, anticoagulation, rate versus rhythm control, AF with RVR, antiarrhythmics, cardioversion, and board pearls.

title: Hyponatremia: The Complete Resident Guide
summary: Resident-level guide to hyponatremia including serum osmolality, volume status, urine sodium, urine osmolality, SIADH, hypovolemic and hypervolemic causes, and safe correction strategies.

title: ICU Pressors, Sedation, Analgesia, and Paralysis: The Complete Resident Guide
summary: Resident-level ICU guide to vasopressors, inotropes, sedation, analgesia, RASS goals, and neuromuscular blockade with practical dosing, side effects, and bedside decision-making.

title: Mechanical Ventilation in the ICU
summary: High-yield review of mechanical ventilation, ventilator modes, ARDS, ventilator settings, weaning, extubation, and ICU management.
